role_title: Associate Manager, New Verticals - Selection Strategy & Operations

level_signals: Explicitly stated as an individual contributor position
Comp range $105,400–$155,000 base consistent with mid-senior IC at DoorDash

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: You have 4-6+ years of experience. You've succeeded in high-performing cultures (tech, operations, strategy, consulting, banking, startups or a related experience).
must_haves.qualifier: high-performing cultures: tech, operations, strategy, consulting, banking, startups

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: You are comfortable with SQL and data visualization tools.
You possess a sharp analytical mind, and can extract and communicate meaningful insights from data to drive strategic decisions.

You'll spearhead cross-functional projects, collaborating with Engineers, Data Scientists, and Product Managers to develop and implement tech solutions that increase selection across our New Vertical offerings.
You'll create and execute quarterly and annual strategic plans aligned with product capabilities to elevate order quality.
You are an operator. You don't hesitate to get in the weeds and operate at the lowest level of detail, but you're also able to think long-term.
You have a completed Bachelor's Degree.

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: You solve problems from first principles. You're excited to think innovatively, and you resist "this is how it's always been done" thinking.
this can vary from AI-powered selection predictions to improving the Cx shopping experience

scope.surface: New Verticals Fulfillment pod — selection coverage and inventory management across Convenience, Grocery, Alcohol, and Retail
scope.business_model: marketplace / on-demand delivery (B2C and B2B merchant partnerships)
core_responsibilities: Lead scoping, go-to-market, and iteration of tech solutions to improve selection coverage
Work on initiatives addressing selection gaps and improving inventory management through machine learning
Analyze data and drive business decision-making using SQL
Own and deliver on improving key selection metrics
Create and execute quarterly and annual strategic plans aligned with product capabilities
Build strategic initiatives and drive innovation across New Vertical offerings

green_flags: Comprehensive benefits package including 401(k) with employer matching, 16 weeks paid parental leave
Clear product surface and ownership area (New Verticals Fulfillment pod)
Clear reporting structure (reports to a Manager) and IC status explicitly stated
Inclusive hiring commitment and accommodations offered
red_flags: Work location/remote eligibility not clearly stated in the role body — location type marked as unclear
JD references NYC AEDT notice suggesting possible NYC office tie but does not confirm location requirements for this specific role
Years range '4-6+' is slightly ambiguous — lower bound is 4 but the '+' after 6 suggests open-ended senior preference

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from title, IC statement, years required, and comp range)
scope.primary_metrics_inferred (inferred from responsibilities; not explicitly listed in JD)
location.type (unclear; role body does not specify remote/hybrid/onsite)
ambiguities: Work location is not explicitly stated in the role body. The NYC AEDT notice implies a possible NYC office connection but does not confirm this is the role's required location. Location type left as 'unclear'.
Years experience stated as '4-6+' — the '+' after 6 could imply preference for more senior candidates; minimum captured as 4.
